raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "With claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "box_2 (light brown) is accessible on top of box_1 and there is enough lateral clearance on both sides for both end-effectors to establish a firm grasp; the attachment between box_2 and box_1 can be overcome without tearing the cardboard or destabilizing the stack.",
    "Postcondition": "box_2 is securely grasped by both end-effectors and lifted clear of box_1, removing the direct obstruction over box_1."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "table (right side, clear area)",
    "Action concept": "Place",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "With claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "vertically",
    "Precondition": "box_2 is held securely; a clear placement region on the table to the right side is available so box_2 will not interfere with accessing box_1 afterward.",
    "Postcondition": "box_2 is placed on the table to the right side and released, leaving box_1 fully exposed from above and laterally."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "With claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "box_1 (dark brown) is now unobstructed (box_2 removed) and there is sufficient clearance on both lateral faces of box_1 for the two end-effectors to form a stable clamp grasp; the tabletop surface provides stable support during grasp acquisition.",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 is securely grasped by both end-effectors and lifted off the table (picked up)."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: box_2 (light brown) is accessible on top of box_1 and there is enough lateral clearance on both sides for both end-effectors to establish a firm grasp; the attachment between box_2 and box_1 can be overcome without tearing the cardboard or destabilizing the stack.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_2 is securely grasped by both end-effectors and lifted clear of box_1, removing the direct obstruction over box_1.

parsed_json.Precondition: box_2 is held securely; a clear placement region on the table to the right side is available so box_2 will not interfere with accessing box_1 afterward.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_2 is placed on the table to the right side and released, leaving box_1 fully exposed from above and laterally.

parsed_json.Precondition: box_1 (dark brown) is now unobstructed (box_2 removed) and there is sufficient clearance on both lateral faces of box_1 for the two end-effectors to form a stable clamp grasp; the tabletop surface provides stable support during grasp acquisition.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 is securely grasped by both end-effectors and lifted off the table (picked up).
